settings.editor: AEC PM Connect is a unique event designed to bring together AEC project managers, equipping them with the tools and strategies they need to successfully manage and deliver projects within their organizations. The first AEC PM Connect event was held in 2024 by Anthony Fasano, P.E., AEC PM, and the Engineering Management Institute.
Attendees will earn up to 3 Professional Development Hours (PDHs) for attending AEC PM Connect.
Sponsors
Pennoni
Dewberry
Colliers Engineering & Design
Trinovate Advisors
Keen Wealth Advisors
School of PE
Talent Matters

We’re excited to announce that AEC PM Connect 2026 will take place on Wednesday, June 10, 2026, at the Forsgate Country Club in New Jersey. This unique event brings together professionals across the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction industry who are dedicated to advancing project management practices and developing the next generation of project managers.

It is clear that success in the AEC industry depends on effective project management. Without strong PM strategies, firms cannot grow sustainably.
Wednesday, June, 10th 2026

Below is an overview of the agenda.

CLICK HERE for a flyer.

June 10, 2026
Forsgate Country Club
375 Forsgate Dr, Monroe Township, NJ 08831

AEC PM Connect is designed for both current project managers and those focused on project management development within their firms. For 2026, we will offer two dedicated tracks: 

  • One tailored to experienced project managers who want to strengthen their leadership and technical delivery skills.
  • One designed specifically for PM Developers looking to better mentor, train, and support project managers at all levels.

You can expect a full day of engaging keynotes, interactive learning sessions, and practical discussions on emerging trends, leadership strategies, and proven best practices that elevate project delivery and team success.

Throughout the day, you’ll have plenty of opportunities to connect with peers, exchange insights, and build your professional network within the AEC community.

Can’t make it for the full day? Join us for the networking reception at the close of the program!

This pass grants entry only to the evening reception, where you’ll connect with attendees, speakers, and industry leaders in a relaxed, social setting.

Please note:
  • Full-day registrants already have access to the reception — there’s no need to purchase this pass separately.
  • The Reception-Only Pass does not include access to daytime sessions, workshops, or meals served during the main program.

We are actively coordinating speakers and offering opportunities for topic-specific experts, panelists, and facilitators. If you're interested in speaking at AEC PM Connect New Jersey, please contact us.

settings.editor:
We hope you’re excited to visit 2026 AEC PM Connect New Jersey!

The AEC PM Connect event will take place at Forsgate Country Club located at
375 Forsgate Dr, Monroe Township, NJ 08831.

There are a number of accommodations in the area.
*DoubleTree by Hilton Monroe Township Cranbury is the closest option*
BOOK YOUR ROOM

Room Rate: $153 per night (as per November 2025)

Please Note: This is not a room block; this is only a recommendation from the AEC PM Connect team.
 
We encourage you to make your room reservations as soon as possible to secure the best rate available.

Partner with AEC PM Connect to
Grow Your Influence

AEC PM Connect provides partners with a valuable opportunity to strengthen their brand, grow their network, and connect with a highly skilled audience of AEC project management professionals. 

This opportunity for sponsors is different from most industry events in that the AEC PM Connect audience is very engaged and there are many opportunities for real conversations. Sponsorship offers exceptional visibility, meaningful connections, and a platform to establish thought leadership in AEC project management. It’s an ideal way to show your dedication to the industry while showcasing your expertise and innovative approaches to project management.
If you would like to discuss, please contact us through the form below.
Secure Your Spot at AEC PM Connect 2026!

Don’t miss this full day of insights, learning, and connection with AEC project management leaders.

Secure your ticket today to guarantee your seat at the event.

metadata._yoast_wpseo_metadesc: AEC PM Connect New Jersey brings AEC project managers and firm leaders together in 2026 to connect, learn, and lead stronger projects.
metadata._yoast_wpseo_opengraph-description: Join AEC PM Connect New Jersey to build connections, exchange real-world project management lessons, and grow your leadership impact.
metadata._yoast_wpseo_twitter-description: AEC PM Connect New Jersey focuses on real challenges and solutions in AEC project management. Meet, learn, and lead together.
